title: Marbled's Netherless [MN]
description: A mod that makes all resources from the Nether obtainable without ever leaving the Overworld
body:
[![BH Partner](https://i.postimg.cc/cJwynrYz/mhs-partnerbanner.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)
## **Marbled's Netherless**
![mn title](https://i.postimg.cc/6pwrk3FS/mn-logo.png)
**Marbled's Netherless** is a mod for **[Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 1.20.1** that adds survival crafting recipes for items and blocks from the Nether dimension without ever leaving the Overworld.

## **Features**
- 2 new items to craft Ancient Debris, Ancient Debris Fragments and Ancient Debris Shards. 
- 1 new item to craft Smithing Templates, Smithing Template Molds.
- Recipes for blocks & items such as Blaze Rods, Quartz, Crimson/Warped Fungi, Glowstone Dust, Netherrack, Soul Sand, Soul Soil, and more.

## **Usage**
- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 

MarbledHubb Studios is proudly partnered with [BisectHosting!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth) When using our code "marbledhubb", you are saving 25% off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our projects!
